svg.title: Gateway BFF with module-level BFFs architecture
svg.desc: A customer browser hosts a portal shell CSR app that embeds a Module 1 CSR app. The browser talks only to a Gateway BFF, which handles the Entra ID auth cycle and proxies requests to module-level BFFs. Module 1 BFF is internal-only and not directly reachable from the browser. It calls a third-party API and records usage through a shared metering library. A placeholder shows future Module 2/3 BFFs following the same pattern.
